title: Trainings — New Faculty Development Seminars
content:
The New Faculty Development Seminars are an ORA-hosted seminar series intended primarily for new faculty at Morgan State University. The series spans the grant lifecycle, funding sources, proposal components and review, research and fiscal compliance, pedagogy, AI in research, history of Morgan, and professional societies and fellowships. Seminars are recorded (where permitted) and the slide decks are posted as PDFs.

The series is organized into the following themed categories. Each entry below lists the title, date, presenter, and (where available) a Zoom recording or YouTube link. PDF decks are hosted on morgan.edu under /Documents/ADMINISTRATION/OFFICES/ora/.

OVERVIEW OF RESEARCH:
- Lifecycle of Sponsored Research (2023-11-01) — Justin Bonny, PhD. PDF: 2023-11-01_Bonny_ora_newfaculty_grant_lifecycle.pdf.
- Grant Life Cycle (2022-10-31) — Farin Kamangar, MD, PhD. Recording: https://morganstate.zoom.us/rec/share/w8-sU7mToDsQNlmrNGmCc45HWuZXi7xGSxgMaV86VtdrtQ2lkX4ZX8C9gu1xs1kl.GHm-OYiRIX7DbG6f
- Online Resources (2022-10-20) — Gillian Silver, MPH, CPH (start at 33:23 of the Zoom recording).
- Intro to Research Administration (2022-10-17) — Farin Kamangar, MD, PhD.
- An Introduction: MSU ORA (2022-10-10) — Farin Kamangar, MD, PhD. Recording: https://morganstate.zoom.us/rec/share/0cV296kW_RoClgeHDARiuQoA1icL7FNxRnWrHKzG4bs4sk1O6q0tkhdzeeC_J3HA.O5hwFrFmLDmYgjOF

FUNDING SOURCES:
- NSF Special Seminar for Early Career Faculty Members (2024-02-15) — Claudia Rankins, PhD (PRISSEM Academic Services, LLC). Recording: https://morganstate.zoom.us/rec/share/5OzzS3ny4haTHHRNPzvi_qvOCE4GrlniwcHs0UiM5eP1Cg2F_XJA4Xx1lcynoGLG.-3Qx5CpD4miyTRYA
- NSF Funding Opportunities for Early-Career Researchers (2023-04-13) — Claudia Rankins, PhD (PRISSEM). Recording: https://morganstate.zoom.us/rec/share/mZa6N5uO5xgc559B_JaRmPqOxZKboanqutwP7b_cgbtbfAY-tIpP1UGwInOmjD4N.nb0izOHIPe_MeKJ3
- HBCU Funding Sources (2022-10-27) — Gillian Silver, MPH, CPH (start at 24:54).
- R & D Funding Sources (2022-10-24) — Farin Kamangar, MD, PhD.

PROPOSAL COMPONENTS & REVIEW:
- Research Strategy/Plan (2024-03-14) — Mansoureh Jeihani, PhD.
- Writing a Specific Aims Page (2024-03-07) — Valerie Odero-Marah, PhD. Resources include University of Alabama at Birmingham Specific Aims Examples, University of Arizona Sample NIH Proposal, Texas Tech Specific Aims Examples.
- Strategies for Grant Proposal Development (2023-02-27) — Tracy Rone, PhD. Recording: https://morganstate.zoom.us/rec/share/8xFMe6FcB7F6ulaxc0-lmkZI_ipgIS35lOZjdx1cLs7_wVkcg4zK-U5XwX8bb3s5.k8oEBkO1IB_bnc7M
- Research Plan (2023-02-20) — Farin Kamangar, MD, PhD. Recording: https://morganstate.zoom.us/rec/share/qhGWbL8T4iyCfROzh05d0BYk2je8m2NuK76V7mXm52g3cW-aBRt6uOW0aTQtmf0H.VPdULRJovvG0GeIZ
- Specific Aims (2023-02-13) — Farin Kamangar, MD, PhD. Recording: https://morganstate.zoom.us/rec/share/Mo1vBzrDR2TsNJAcC7STOq5XCprHLghA42-70fcNxsd_r6-9JFf4j-_pXBFFCDZg.4QI0R7LjB-kVh3Q9
- Grant Review Criteria (2023-01-30) — Paul Tchounwou, PhD. Recording: https://morganstate.zoom.us/rec/share/lUPAQGxNup7BmzYq3sKLwUklU1fBtt8r10yQ2RBUzu0m6Y9cyHdQ5kkNsvh0Cn4d.CLIlM4yseobxbAEA
- Create a Budget for your Research Grant (2022-11-21) — Gillian Silver, MPH, CPH.

RESEARCH & FISCAL COMPLIANCE:
- Fiscal Compliance (2022-12-05) — Farin Kamangar, MD, PhD. Recording: https://morganstate.zoom.us/rec/share/kmspCv_hIESKli4Rrlsj0GSVqnjGyn-ZbQYmZOqsXSjA5Arpo284u-8a-e5-B_o0.BpXLnI4hqpDofs1q
- Responsible Conduct of Research (2022-11-14) — Edet Isuk, PhD. Recording: https://morganstate.zoom.us/rec/share/miNVpB5VcD8CQOy4tR2UfoDWfUnksdEytMLJ0Byyy9bcKC3iPWlxbEEuroBDlEYu.cSBIfRq24VAYA0dg

PEDAGOGY:
- Instructional Excellence Pt 2 (2024-02-01) — Laura Dorsey-Elson, PhD.
- Instructional Excellence Pt 1 (2023-11-16) — Laura Dorsey-Elson, PhD.
- Student Engagement and Assessment (2023-02-06 & 2023-02-09) — Laura Dorsey-Elson, PhD.
- Best Practice in Alternative Assessment (no exact date listed) — presenter not specified.
- Instructional Excellence at Morgan (2022-11-07) — Laura Dorsey-Elson, PhD.

AI IN RESEARCH:
- Harnessing AI for Research Funding Success (2025-09-30) — Gillian Silver, MPH, CPH, CRA, CPRA, CFRA. Resources include a List of AI Tools prepared by UMMS CARTI.

HISTORY OF MORGAN:
- History Presentation (2023-01-19) — Edwin Johnson, PhD (start at 42:17 of the Zoom recording).

PROFESSIONAL SOCIETIES & FELLOWSHIPS:
- Society Fellowships and Other Honors (2024-02-29) — Farin Kamangar, MD, PhD.
- Road to Elected Fellowships: AAAS and IBNS (2024-02-29) — Christine Hohmann, PhD.
- Fulbright Scholar Opportunities (2024-02-29) — Megan DeVirgilis, PhD.

The page does not enforce a fixed weekly cadence; sessions are scheduled throughout the academic year, with new content announced via ORA channels. Most recent addition: Harnessing AI for Research Funding Success on 2025-09-30. The target audience is new faculty members, but materials are open to all MSU faculty and research staff.

Registration is not formally required for the archived recordings/PDFs. For live sessions, contact ORA at ask.ora@morgan.edu or 443-885-4044.

Additional details revealed by Playwright (per-seminar resource PDFs):

Proposal Components & Review — Tracy Rone's 2023-02-27 'Strategies for Grant Proposal Development' session is accompanied by FIVE resource PDFs hosted on morgan.edu/Documents/ADMINISTRATION/OFFICES/ora/2022 Faculty Development Seminars/: (a) RL32159 'How to Develop and Write a Grant Proposal' (CRS report); (b) 'A Guide to Writing Successful Field-Initiated Research Grant Proposals' (Spencer Foundation, 2020-11-20); (c) NSF Build and Broaden 2.0 Proposal Writing Template (2023-03-27); (d) Grant Solicitation Alignment Table (2023-03-27); (e) 'How to Decipher a Program Solicitation: NSF Build and Broaden' (marked-up walkthrough). Specific Aims seminar (Kamangar, 2023-02-13) provides 'MSU Specific Aims Examples' PDF and 'UAB Specific Aims Examples' PDF as supplements. Writing a Specific Aims Page seminar (Odero-Marah, 2024-03-07) links to three external proposal example PDFs: UAB CFAR Specific Aims Examples (https://www.uab.edu/medicine/cfar/images/Specific_Aims_Examples.pdf), Arizona College of Medicine Tucson Emergency Medicine Sample NIH Proposal (https://emergencymed.arizona.edu/sites/emergencymed.arizona.edu/files/sample_nih_proposal_4.pdf), and Texas Tech University Health Sciences Center Nursing Specific Aims Examples (https://www.ttuhsc.edu/nursing/documents/research/grant-writing-examples-specific-AIMS.pdf).

Pedagogy — Laura Dorsey-Elson's Feb 6 and Feb 9 2023 'Student Engagement and Assessment' sessions have TWO Zoom recordings (Recording 1 and Recording 2) plus a 'Best Practice in Alternative Assessment' resource PDF. The 2022-11-07 'Instructional Excellence at Morgan' session has a companion .docx 'Links Listing' resource. The 2023-11-16 'Instructional Excellence Pt 1' is accompanied by a separate 'Links' PDF resource.

AI in Research — In addition to the 2025-09-30 'Harnessing AI for Research Funding Success' slide deck by Gillian Silver, there is a separate 'AI Tools List' PDF prepared by UMMS CARTI (University of Maryland School of Medicine Center for AI Research, Translation, and Implementation) available at /Documents/ADMINISTRATION/OFFICES/ora/2025 Faculty Development Seminars/AI_Tools_UMB.pdf.

Professional Societies & Fellowships — The 2024-02-29 session was a multi-presenter panel that included Oscar Barton, Jr., PE, PhD (Dean of School of Engineering) in addition to Kamangar, Hohmann, and DeVirgilis. The session's recording is hosted on zoom.us rather than morganstate.zoom.us (Zoom share ID: Ih9xKBK9_7hSzCtI8NgrZ5-qrpP7RiMWtbNbXRXyBptdD3t00g4Z-uJSD3v5Tbly.EJlezbTEGKUgYIoa).

Overview of Research — Online Resources by Gillian Silver (2022-10-20) and Intro to Research Administration by Kamangar (2022-10-17) share the same Zoom recording URL (mb2Z3aJMIcDGTNeabP3LJAxla0M_WC1P8tu4beM1EhMLrcN-i85zX3FTrNo6b4pr.DZMkmrh-TSZLYpma), wrapped via Proofpoint redirector. R & D Funding Sources (Kamangar, 2022-10-24) and HBCU Funding Sources (Silver, 2022-10-27) likewise share the same Zoom recording URL (RujGdd_kHy-I055p7A2nGqqTubWXFmme3FlGtae6Rtzad7qzzq4w8GpPv6WcDpFA.9oVrMVQ3zov3M-K_).
